case_title: SHAIKH, ABDUL H. vs. CHEROLES, LENITA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEROLES, LENITA JOHNSON, REGINALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2084 MISSION STREET, ROOM #23, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, ALTHOUGH COURT ORDERED $1,400 FOR RENTS/DAMAGES FOR THE PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT, PLTF. PREPARED A JUDGMENT WAIVING ALL BACK RENTS AND DAMAGES AND CLERK VERIFIED THIS TO BE PLTF'S DECISION BY CALLING PLTF'S OFFICE BEFORE JUDGMENT WAS SIGNED BY JUDGE VON BEROLDINGEN. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-15-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, JURY DEMAND STRICKEN; L.CHEROLES LATE, R.JOHNSON NP SETTL
